mapper.select:
SELECT cust_cd, cust_nm, cust_type, tel, addr, created_by, created_at, updated_by, updated_at FROM tb_customer
AND cust_cd LIKE '%' || #{cust_cd} || '%'
AND cust_nm LIKE '%' || #{cust_nm} || '%'
AND cust_type = #{cust_type}
ORDER BY cust_cd
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_customer (cust_cd, cust_nm, cust_type, tel, addr, created_by, created_at, updated_by, updated_at) VALUES (#{cust_cd}, #{cust_nm}, #{cust_type}, #{tel}, #{addr}, #{user_id}, NOW(), #{user_id}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_customer SET cust_nm = #{cust_nm}, cust_type = #{cust_type}, tel = #{tel}, addr = #{addr}, updated_by = #{user_id}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE cust_cd = #{cust_cd}
